properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v2 v3 v3 v4 v5 v2 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: The LORD, my God, my strength and song, has now become my victory.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The LORD is God, and I will praise him, My father's God, and I will exalt him.

verse.name: v4
v5
verse.lines: I will sing unto the LORD, for he has triumphed gloriously: the grave is empty. Won't you come and see? The LORD, my God, my strength and song, has now become my victory.
